purpose: Fix UI and legacy reports so stale cache/recommendation snapshots do not appear as live price conflicts after V11.1.
changes: Patched index.html data quality card to use nullish fallback, so real zero price conflicts stays zero.
Patched price reconciliation to ignore stale cache/recommendation/history snapshots as conflict sources.
Synced price-source-audit with Price Truth Layer as a price-only audit.
Reordered workflow so price audit follows Price Truth Layer.
No manual CSV or non-public data was added.
conclusion: تم حل رقم تعارض الأسعار المضلل. استمرار عدم ظهور BUY سببه الحقيقي الآن هو نقص التاريخ الكافي وخطط/مخاطر بعض الأسهم، وليس تعارض السعر.
